ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "pregnancies" INTEGER /* Number of pregnancies the patient has had */,
  "glucose" INTEGER /* Glucose level of the patient */,
  "blood_pressure" INTEGER /* Blood pressure of the patient */,
  "skin_thickness" INTEGER /* Skin thickness measurement of the patient */,
  "insulin" INTEGER /* Insulin level of the patient */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index of the patient */,
  "diabetes_pedigree_function" REAL /* Diabetes pedigree function score */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Diabetes result (1 for positive, 0 for negative) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact details of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the doctor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the doctor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area of the doctor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the doctor */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the doctor */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the doctor */,
  "consultation_fee" REAL /* Consultation fee of the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the appointment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor associated with the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "consultation_type" TEXT /* Type of consultation (e.g., physical, virtual) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient receiving the medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "medication_type" TEXT /* Type of medication (e.g., tablet, injection) */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication intake */,
  "refills_remaining" INTEGER /* Number of refills remaining for the medication */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date of prescription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test performed */,
  "test_category" TEXT /* Category of the test (e.g., blood, urine) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the test */,
  "reference_range" TEXT /* Reference range for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle_factors" (
  "lifestyle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifestyle entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the lifestyle factors */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient (e.g., smoker, non-smoker) */,
  "exercise_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of exercise (e.g., daily, weekly, rarely) */,
  "diet_type" TEXT /* Type of diet followed by the patient (e.g., balanced, high-carb) */,
  "sleep_pattern" TEXT /* Sleep pattern of the patient (e.g., regular, irregular) */,
  "stress_level" TEXT /* Stress level of the patient (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifestyle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifestyle_factors_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, doctor, data analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the record */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the health record entry */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of record (e.g., visit notes, lab results) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed notes or results associated with the record */,
  "record_status" TEXT /* Status of the health record (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the billing */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount billed for the visit/treatment */,
  "billing_date" TEXT /* Date of the billing entry */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the billing (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback submission */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions provided by the patient */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the healthcare services (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
